programmes.show_description: Trouble on the traction line leaves Craig frustrated by endless breakdowns; a driver fights a back injury to keep the trucks moving and a log hauler's crash sparks an all-night rescue.
A driver travels through an area where bush fire has run wild. An owner operator faces the busiest week of his career.
When a driver transporting booze decouples at a lorry park, his trailer's landing legs are swallowed by some porous tarmac. The recovery pushes Jordan and Merrie's skills to the limit.
There's an emergency in East London when a 25-ton truck hits a railway bridge. And Buzz needs to co-ordinate a multi-agency taskforce when a refrigerated lorry catches fire on the A42.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The chaotic weather sees the small town of Lochcarron effectively cut off from the outside world when a huge landslide brings tonnes of rock and trees crashing down.
This all-action episode begins with reports of suspected lorry looters at a service station in Trowell, and firearms cops Jim and Lewis race to intercept.
In this high-octane episode, several units get on the tail of a white van that's been gunning it around town at four times the speed limit.
Western. A bounty hunter and would-be senator is tasked with hunting down a crafty, knife-wielding peasant accused of the murder of a young girl. With Lee Van Cleef. (1966)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. A bounty hunter and would-be senator is tasked with hunting down a crafty, knife-wielding peasant accused of the murder of a young girl. With Lee Van Cleef. (1966)
Western adventure starring John Wayne and Jorge Rivero. A Union army colonel sets out to settle scores and find the traitors responsible for his friend's death. (1970)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western adventure starring John Wayne and Jorge Rivero. A Union army colonel sets out to settle scores and find the traitors responsible for his friend's death. (1970)
In Berkshire, a convoy of three trucks pick up and deliver a fleet of 15 valuable supercars, ensuring they arrive in precisely the same pristine condition as when they were loaded.
The cops deal with a suicidal man with mental health problems, an Eritrean woman dumped out of a lorry by people traffickers, and a lass who's had a barney with her boyfriend.
A reckless driver gives Sergeant Steve the slip in bad weather. Ben has a run-in with an argumentative drink driver who fails three breath tests.
A white van man makes a break for it after ploughing into a parked car, and a suspect is not keen on wearing a set of cuffs.
A BMW spitting out plumes of smoke is ditched by its driver, an uninsured driver is adamant she has a policy, and police attend an unauthorised boy racer rally.
A routine area search leaves a sergeant caught off guard and surrounded by an aggressive family; an assault at a night club brings aggression and verbal abuse.
A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details.
Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels.
Mulder and Scully track a legendary creature that has roamed the New Jersey countryside for over 40 years.
An early spring thaw turns roadwork into a muddy mess for Brent and Taylor. Craig clashes with his son-in-law and the boss receives a call that could jeopardise his entire operation.
Turbo gambles his truck and his life to complete an epic journey home. Plus, logging trucker Brett has a battle on his hands to deliver some huge machines deep into a mountain forest.
Jobs include a bulker trailer that's burst into flames, a heavily laden DAF truck that's wedged in soft mud by a busy dual carriageway, and a tractor unit with a broken prop shaft.
In a 600-metre-long tunnel on the M25, self-proclaimed 'A-Team' Steve and Daniel must combine forces to try to shift a 44-tonne unit and trailer stacked full of breeze blocks.

Charlie and Paul pursue a driver that stole fuel, and Chris and Sophie spot a bunny-hopping learner driver who already has eight points on his provisional license.
Steve rides to the aid of the armed response team after reports of a man drawing a gun on a pizza delivery driver. Charley and Wayne take away a drink driver at the drive thru.
PC Will Hunter gets out the breathalyser for a driver - will he be over the limit the morning after the night before? And police pull up a suspected cloned car.
A worse-for-wear driver in North Tyneside has no plans to come quietly when pursued by the cops, and a police chopper helps track down a driver on the run.
A child is knocked off his bike - but the wait time for an ambulance is three hours. Martain spots a speedy driver. It turns out to be a takeaway 'emergency'.
The driver of a possible cloned car refuses to come quietly, a woman is suspected of drug driving, and a drink driver is remarkably jolly about getting caught.
A BMW spitting out plumes of smoke is ditched by its driver, an uninsured driver is adamant she has a policy, and police attend an unauthorised boy racer rally.
Frontier action yarn starring James Stewart and Robert Ryan. When a trio of bounty hunters catches a vicious killer, the wanted man sows seeds of discord among his captors. (1953)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A man claiming to be 121 years old tells the remarkable story of his experiences as a pioneer, Cheyenne brave, gunfighter, con man and survivor of Custer's Last Stand. (1970)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Crime drama starring John Wayne and Richard Attenborough. Chicago cop Jim Brannigan is sent to the U.K. to extradite wanted crime boss Ben Larkin, but Larkin's hitmen lie in wait. (1975)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Pilot episode of the cult drama series. Sceptical agent Dana Scully is assigned a new partner - Fox 'Spooky' Mulder - notorious for his fascination with the supernatural.
